description:
The OnlineStatusSettings component is used to define how online status for the user should be handled.

See Settings.

fields.DefaultStatus: The default status for the user when they log in.
fields.RememberMode: Whether the status the user had when they were last on should be remembered.
fields.RememberTimespan: How long to remember the last status from the previous login before setting back to default again.
fields.InvisibleRememberMode: How to remember the previous status from the last login.
fields.InvisibleRememberTimespan: How long to remember a status if it's set to invisible.
fields.AutoAwayTimespan: How long to wait when the user is AFK before enabling Away.
fields.EnableDefaultStatus: Whether to enable the default status behavior.
fields.ShowRememberTimespan: Whether to show the remember timespan control UI.
fields.ShowInvisibleRememberTimespan: Whether to show the remember invisible timespan control UI.
